ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project is expected to end */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the package belongs to */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "last_commit_hash" TEXT /* Last commit hash for the package */,
  "last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the type belongs to */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the type was last modified */,
  "author_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_types_author_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_types_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type the method belongs to */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the method was last modified */,
  "author_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the method is active */,
  "test_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage percentage of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_author_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_smells" (
  "test_smell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test smell */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method the test smell is detected in */,
  "test_smell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test smell type */,
  "cause_of_smell" TEXT /* Cause of the test smell */,
  "total_assertions" INTEGER /* Total number of assertions in the test method */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the test smell (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test smell (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the test smell was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the resolution of the test smell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_smell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_smells_cause_of_smell FOREIGN KEY ("cause_of_smell") REFERENCES test_smell_causes ("test_smell_cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_smells_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_smells_test_smell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_smell_type_id") REFERENCES test_smell_types ("test_smell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method the test result is for */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the test was run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in milliseconds */,
  "log_file" TEXT /* File path to the log file */,
  "test_smell_count" INTEGER /* Number of test smells detected in the test run */,
  "test_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage percentage of the test run */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was run (e.g., development, staging, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the test run is for */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the test run was executed */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests in the run */,
  "passed_tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests that passed */,
  "failed_tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests that failed */,
  "skipped_tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests that were skipped */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test run was executed */,
  "build_number" TEXT /* Build number of the CI/CD pipeline */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash for the build */,
  "test_smell_count" INTEGER /* Total number of test smells detected in the test run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_run_details" (
  "test_run_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run detail */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method the test run detail is for */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in milliseconds */,
  "log_file" TEXT /* File path to the log file */,
  "test_smell_count" INTEGER /* Number of test smells detected in the test method */,
  "test_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage percentage of the test method */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_run_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_run_details_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_run_details_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("test_run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was assigned to the project */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user is active in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_tracking" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "test_smell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test smell the issue is related to */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to resolve the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the issue is due to be resolved */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "estimated_resolution_date" TEXT /* Estimated date the issue will be resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_tracking_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_tracking_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_tracking_test_smell_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_smell_id") REFERENCES test_smells ("test_smell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_smell_types" (
  "test_smell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test smell type */,
  "test_smell_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test smell type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test smell type */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the test smell type (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test smell type (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_smell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_smell_causes" (
  "test_smell_cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test smell cause */,
  "test_smell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test smell type */,
  "cause_description" TEXT /* Description of the common cause */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the test smell cause (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test smell cause (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_smell_cause_id")
)
